form.formComment: Last start game effort when 3rd (Fr3) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by Kwick Sand (1:54.00) in NW20081L5 on April 7 at $6.17. Two runs back won by 1.5 m (Fr5) at this track (1:53.30) beating Bondi Lockdown in NW20041L5 on March 31 at $11.76. In the mix from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at this track beaten 15 m by Kwick Sand (1:54.00) in NW20081L5 on April 7 at $23.01. Showed ability the race before when he posted a big 6 m win (Fr4) at this track (1:54.20) beating Bourbon County in NW17077L5 on March 23 at $8.05. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1609m. Last start won by 5 m as favourite (Fr4) at this track (1:54.00) beating American Dealer in NW20081L5 on April 7 at $3.39. Recent form hard to fault.
